docs.title: ITS Agent Ontology
docs.text:
This ontology defines concepts related to ITS agents.

This ontology imports the following files:

  • https://w3id.org/citydata/part1/v1/Agent.owl

docs.title: Properties
docs.text:
• ITSAgentObjectProperty
  • playsRole

The formal definition of this ontology is available in TURTLE Syntax.

docs.title: Agent
docs.text: A person, organization, group, or software agent that performs a role. The role may add additional properties to the agent.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated cdm1_Agent cdm1:Agent ITSAgentThing ITSAgentThing Agent Agent Agent->cdm1_Agent Agent->ITSAgentThing Role Role Agent->Role playsRole

docs.title: Formalization for Agent
docs.text: Property Constraint playsRole only Role subClassOf ITSAgentThing subClassOf cdm1:Agent

docs.title: ITSAgentThing
docs.text: Added for organizational purposes to identify classes defined in the Agent part of the ITS Ontology.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated its-core_ITSThing its-core:ITSThing ITSAgentThing ITSAgentThing ITSAgentThing->its-core_ITSThing

docs.title: Specializations of ITSAgentThing
docs.text: Class Description Agent A person, organization, group, or software agent that performs a role. The role may add additional properties to the agent. Role A role that an agent can perform. The role may add additional properties to the agent.

docs.title: Role
docs.text: A role that an agent can perform. The role may add additional properties to the agent.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated ITSAgentThing ITSAgentThing Role Role Role->ITSAgentThing

docs.title: ITSAgentObjectProperty
docs.text:
An object property to organize all object properties defined in the ITS Agent Ontology.

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/agent/v1/ITSAgentObjectProperty

docs.title: playsRole
docs.text:
Indicates the role that an agent performs.

Domain: Agent

Range: Role
